title: After the Japanese Derby: Live It Up, Even in Defeat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin wins the Japanese Derby. Mejiro Palmer
is overwhelmed by her intense dash for the finish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The entire racecourse chants Ines Fujin's name. So
moved is she by Ines's performance, Mejiro
Palmer finds herself joining in with their cheer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, after reviewing the day's race,
Daitaku Helios seems to have come up with some
kind of "god-tier" race plan.
